description: Per-client-type OAuth 2.0 / OIDC flow selection per RFC 9700.

flows.notes: PKCE is required even with client_secret; secret is not safe in a browser
Use system browser tab (Custom Tab / SFSafariViewController), not WebView
Bind to a random loopback port
User completes auth on a separate device
Client secret lives in a server-side secret manager
Bind to workload identity (SPIFFE / OIDC trust)

anti_patterns.rule: Implicit flow is forbidden by RFC 9700 §2.1.2
ROPC flow is forbidden by RFC 9700 §2.4
PKCE S256 is required for all public clients
Missing state parameter allows CSRF on the authorization callback
redirect_uri must be an exact match; never use wildcard, prefix, or open redirect
